name: Salmon Spinach & Cannelloni
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Frozen, chopped spinach - thawed and drained
or homemade pasta cut into 6-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the filling: In a large bowl, combine the spinach, ricotta, salmon, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
2. Make the tomato-cream sauce: In a medium saucepan, combine the butter, cream, and tomato paste. Bring the mixture to a boil, then let simmer until the cream is reduced by one-third.
3. Cook the pasta according to package directions, and drain well.
4. Place 1/3 to 1/2 cup of the filling in each cannelloni (if using homemade pasta, place the filling in the middle of each square of pasta, fold over the sides toward the middle, overlapping them). Place seam side down in a Pyrex baking dish.
5. Pour the tomato-cream sauce over the cannelloni.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
- Up to this point may be prepared several hours in advance and refrigerated. Return to room temperature before baking.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes. Serve immediately.
12 rolls - 8 generous portions
